channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Baseball: Canyon Hills 10, Southwest 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great Monday to play some baseball with Southwest hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers go on to win a score fest 10-7. The Rattlers scored six in the first and held on to win, despite Southwest cutting it down to 9-7 before tacking on one more run to win by three.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Scheffler is back to defend his Masters title, if he can make it through the Champions Dinner safely
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The prerogative of choosing the menu for the Champions Dinner at the Masters falls upon the defending champion, and Scottie Scheffler made an addition in his second go-around at those selections that underscored his wry sense of humor. His dad used to make wonderful meatballs.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Octavio Dotel, who once held record of pitching for 13 major league teams, dies in DR roof collapse
item.description: Former major league relief pitcher Octavio Dotel was among the dead after a roof collapsed at a nightclub in his native Dominican Republic where he was attending a merengue concert.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Champions League: Kane misses, Frattesi scores as Inter beats Bayern 2-1
item.description: Inter Milan’s treble chances are still very much on after it won 2-1 at Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Agreement in works to settle Northwestern hazing lawsuits that led to football coach's firing
item.description: Former Northwestern University football players are finalizing an agreement with the school to settle lawsuits alleging hazing and abuse on the team that led to longtime coach Pat Fitzgerald’s firing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kane misses, Frattesi scores as Inter beats Bayern 2-1 in 1st leg of Champions League quarterfinals
item.description: Inter Milan’s treble chances are still very much on after it won 2-1 at Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Wayne Gretzky says he has 'no political power' over the president or prime minister
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Retired NHL great Wayne Gretzky downplayed his influence on Donald Trump in his first public comments since the U.S. president began his second term and began making references to making Canada the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: DI leading scorer Ta'Niya Latson commits to South Carolina
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Ta'Niya Latson, the leading scorer in Division I, has decided to transfer to South Carolina, where she will join a high school teammate and try to help the Gamecocks win another national championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Former Tigers exec Sam Menzin's resignation centers around lewd photos sent to female employees: report
item.description: Sam Menzin, who resigned from his assistant GM role with the Detroit Tigers, allegedly sent unsolicited photos of his genitals to former female employees of the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida wins NCAA Tournament over Houston after erasing 12-point deficit in thrilling fashion
item.description: The Florida Gators came back from a 12-point deficit to beat the Houston Cougars in a thrilling end to the NCAA Tournament, giving the program its first title since 2007.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego senior women's basketball team seeks to compete overseas
item.description: Ten San Diego women over 60 are representing the US in the 17th World MaxiBasketball Championship in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Tickets to the Salt Lake Bees new stadium will cost you more than they used to
item.description: The Salt Lake Bees are playing their first game at the new ballpark in South Jordan tomorrow, though fans of the team might notice that prices are a little different than Smith's Ballpark.
item.dc:creator: Sorina Trauntvein, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls championship banners back up in United Center rafters earlier than expected
item.description: The Chicago Bulls' six championship banners have been rehung at the United Center after being removed due to damage from a rock concert by Disturbed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, will face Houston team that pushes others around
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: The Masters: When it starts, how to watch, betting odds for golf's first major of 2025
item.description: Scottie Scheffler and the rest of golf's best players have gathered again at Augusta National for the Masters.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bears' Jaquan Brisker feels 'best I ever felt,' is eager to test Ben Johnson's offense
item.description: Jaquan Brisker is recovering from a concussion and is eager to face Ben Johnson's offense as the Bears begin their offseason workouts, with a focus on exercise and cognitive performance.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Women's NCAA Final Four tournament a 'slam dunk for Tampa's economy
item.description: Even though the women’s championship is over, Tampa businesses are calling this weekend a "slam dunk." This is the fourth time the city has hosted the NCAA women’s basketball Final Four, and it’s not just basketball fans who are winning.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Geese make nest next to iconic Wrigley Field bleachers during Chicago Cubs games
item.description: The iconic Wrigley Field bleachers welcomed an unusual guest during the Chicago Cubs' series against the San Diego Padres this weekend.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Houston, Florida play for title and put a different spin on the underdog role to wrap March Madness
item.description: Coach Kelvin Sampson’s squad of defenders and deniers face Florida for the national title Monday night. They wrap up a front-runner’s Final Four that featured all No. 1 seeds but ends with the two top ones — Auburn and Duke — sitting at home.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, set to face Houston
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: Set to face Houston in the title game Monday night at the Alamodome, the Gators finally are getting a shot at another national championship.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC stays alive with 4-1 victory over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is probably not going to make the NHL playoffs, but they are not going down without a fight. Karel Vejmelka made 32 saves for Utah in a 4-1 win against the the top team in the NHL, the Winnipeg Jets, at Delta Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Carpenter and Torkelson homer as Tigers beat White Sox 7-2 and drop Chicago to 2-6
item.description: Kerry Carpenter homered for the third time in two games and Spencer Torkelson had a home run and a double Saturday as the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-2 for their fourth win in five games following an opening three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Carson Kelly homers as the Cubs beat the Padres 7-1 for their 5th straight win
item.description: Carson Kelly homered and drove in four runs, and the Chicago Cubs beat the San Diego Padres 7-1 on Saturday for their fifth consecutive win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jackson Merrill, Padres agree to $135 million, 9-year contract
item.description: All-Star outfielder Jackson Merrill started paying immediate dividends on the $135 million, nine-year contract he and the San Diego Padres agreed to on Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
